name: Fakturownia
summary: Planned Fakturownia connector for invoice, client, product and warehouse-document operations in e-commerce accounting pilots.
description: Added because Marketing identifies marketplace -> accounting as a repeatable pilot. Fakturownia documents an open API for invoices, products/services, clients, warehouse documents, payments, categories and warehouses, using API token authentication. This connector can provide a lighter accounting pilot than ERP connectors when the customer already uses Fakturownia.
useCases: Check if marketplace orders that require invoices have documents in Fakturownia.
Read products and clients for reconciliation against marketplace orders.
Prepare invoice drafts with dry-run before write.
